ubscribing Who was Ptolemy II? Ptolemy II Home Ptolemy Home Skip to sidebar Ptolemy II Design Document The Ptolemy Book is the most recent comprehensive documentation: Claudius Ptolemaeus, Editor, " System Design, Modeling, and Simulation Using Ptole

ystem Design, Modeling, and Simulation Using Ptolemy II ," Ptolemy.org, 2014. Available as a free PDF download, a low-cost paperback and as individual chapters. The canonical paper about Ptolemy is: Johan Eker, Jorn Janneck, Edward A. Lee, Jie Liu, X

ohan Eker, Jorn Janneck, Edward A. Lee, Jie Liu, Xiaojun Liu, Jozsef Ludvig, Sonia Sachs, Yuhong Xiong, " Taming heterogeneity - the Ptolemy approach ," Proceedings of the IEEE , 91(1):127-144,January 2003. The Ptolemy Book above documents the curre

y 2003. The Ptolemy Book above documents the current version of Ptolemy II. For older versions of Ptolemy II, the older Ptolemy II Design Documents may be found at: C. Brooks, E.A. Lee, X. Liu, S. Neuendorffer, Y. Zhao, H. Zheng (eds.), " Heterogene
